nodes.title: Number = Resize
widgets_values:
0 = Don't Resize (Warning, images generated from scratch look like shit without resizing)

1 = Resize to selected Resolution

nodes.title: Number = Resize Type
widgets_values:
0 = Worse quality resize, without changing the image at all.

0.35 = Better quality resize, but may slightly affect image.

nodes.title: "Load Image" Info
widgets_values: When ADJUSTING IMAGES, right-click on the "load image" and select "Open in Mask Editor". This menu allows you to Inpaint. Whatever you cover in the black "inpaint" will be changed when adjusting starts. All other parts will remain unchanged.

nodes.title: Number = Resolution
widgets_values:
Note: This is FINAL resolution. Initial image is smaller (but keeps the ratio)
0 = 1280 x 1856 (Width x Height)
1 = 1856 x 1280 (Width x Height)
2 = 1856 x 1856 (Width x Height)

nodes.title: "KSampler" Info
widgets_values:
When MAKING NEW IMAGES, keep the "denoise" of the "KSampler" at "1.00"

When ADJUSTING IMAGES, you can play around with that value. It goes from 0 to 1, and the higher it is, the more the image will be changed from original.

nodes.title: Helpful Info
widgets_values:
Global seed (above) affects the image result. Image with the same seed, same positive/negative prompts, same sampler settings and same resolution will ALWAYS be the same.

Images with the same seed and different prompts will be SIMILAR to each other.

Set to "fixed" if you want to get similar image (for example, different character but in the same pose).

Set to "randomize" if you just want to make images.

Set to "increment/decrement" if you want to adjust image a bit more.

-------------------------------------------------

Set up what you want to make using the settings to the right of this note. Pretty self-explanatory.

Remember to load the actual image if you select loaded image as source (you load to the left, "Generate Base Image" group).

-------------------------------------------------

Bypass things that you don't need to make the workflow faster by using the group bypass node to the right of this note.

DO NOT select "1" in Image Resize Selector if you bypass the resize group (2), it will break the workflow.

You can bypass "1", "2" and "4" when doing manual adjustments to make your life much easier.

You can bypass "3" when NOT doing manual adjustments to make your life much easier.

If you bypass any of the "DO NOT DISABLE" you will break the workflow, so DON'T DO IT.

nodes.title: Bypass Groups to make workflow faster (careful!)

groups.title: # DO NOT DISABLE - Main Checkpoint Load
# DO NOT DISABLE - "Everything Zone" for various USEFUL nodes.
# DO NOT DISABLE - Positive and Negative Conditions
# DO NOT DISABLE - Image Compare & Final Image Choice
